item.title: Not Your Average Marathon Video
item.description: Originally produced as a video for Struthless. A story about motivation, commitment devices, and how the finish line kills your former self.

item.title: The Curse of the Country Song
item.description: Originally created for Struthless in April 2023. A story about creativity, failure, and why the goals you abandon can teach you more than the ones you hit.

item.title: The Dark Why
item.description: Originally created for Struthless in December 2022. 340K+ views. Based on research into motivation, negativity bias, and the psychology of using setbacks to fuel forward momentum.

item.title: How Your Space Can Improve (or Destroy) Your Life
item.description: Originally produced as a video documentary for Struthless in November 2022. Directed by Campbell Walker & Aaron McLachlan. Produced by Aaron McLachlan & Billy Guest. 1.35M+ views.

item.title: Why Bitcoin isn’t crypto anymore
item.description: The decoupling of Bitcoin from the rest of crypto is happening in real time and has been for a while. Jack Dorsey kind of just went and said it out loud.

item.title: What Happens When Your AI Agent Switches Models
everyone hates crypto, what now?
item.description: Crypto is in a weird spot right now. Actually, weird is generous. Everyone hates it, which is far worse than indifference. And this isn't just a content creator problem. If you're building a product and the word 'crypto' is attached to i...
